initiatives.title: trace_exception_flow tool for catch-site enumeration
initiatives.notes: First subagent run stalled on a PreToolUse hook block and exited mid-work; retry with Write-fallback guidance shipped. Scope grew vs plan (7 prod + 1 test): Core interface/DTO split into separate files, DI extension + test infra wiring. Rebased twice over PRs #236 and #237.

initiatives.title: Composite preview: split service + forwarding facade + DI deltas
initiatives.notes: Subagent (batch-2, 2026-04-18) stalled mid-reasoning — final message was the thought fragment 'Actually, let me just try inspecting the file:' with NO <<<RESULT>>> sentinel (matches Appendix C step 1 malformed-result failure). Subagent had written 4 modified prod files + 1 new test (729 insertions) but did not commit / validate / open PR. Partial work preserved as WIP commit 3b56517 on branch remediation/composite-split-service-di-registration. DO NOT re-dispatch to a subagent without human review — the stall point is unknown, re-pickup may need restart rather than completion. Backlog row `composite-split-service-di-registration` remains open in ai_docs/backlog.md P3 table.

initiatives.title: find_duplicated_methods — AST-normalized body hash across solution
initiatives.notes: Scope expanded beyond planned 2 prod + 1 test to 6 prod + 1 test via the planner v3 new-MCP-tool structural-unit exemption: Core contract split (IDuplicateMethodDetectorService + DuplicatedMethodGroupDto + DuplicateMethodAnalysisOptions) + Roslyn impl (DuplicateMethodDetectorService) + Host.Stdio surface (AdvancedAnalysisTools + ServerSurfaceCatalog) + DI registration (ServiceCollectionExtensions.cs). The plan cited Build*Diff helpers across ChangeSignatureService/RestructureService/StringLiteralReplaceService/EditService as real-world validation; those had been consolidated into DiffGenerator.GenerateUnifiedDiff pre-session so subagent pivoted to 9 synthetic unit tests. verify-ai-docs and verify-release both green; unrelated MSBuild file-lock flakes under concurrent test load passed in isolation.

initiatives.title: Same-project type namespace relocation with consumer using-rewrite
initiatives.notes: Scope was 5 prod + 1 test (planned 2 prod + 1 test): INamespaceRelocationService co-located in the service file; DI registration added to ServiceCollectionExtensions.cs. Fits the planner v3 new-MCP-tool structural-unit exemption (4 units: Core contract / Roslyn impl / Host.Stdio tool surface / Registration). verify-ai-docs and verify-release both green; unrelated pre-existing flaky tests passed in isolation.

initiatives.title: Bulk-close six observation/tracking backlog rows (no code changes)
initiatives.notes: Pure-obsoletion bundle: each row is already self-declared PASS / documented-error / context-only / environment-finding / observation-not-a-bug. Rule 1 code-path preconditions vacuously satisfied — zero production code touched.

initiatives.notes: Stale side: implementation. Renamed C# parameter `category` → `taskCategory` to match appendix. Original subagent (pre-retry) was blocked mid-session by the pre-fix PreToolUse hook; retry used plain Edit (no *_apply).

initiatives.title: Tighten PreToolUse hook matcher/prompt for move_type_to_file_apply
Add server_info connectivity precheck to primary skills
initiatives.notes: Identical Connectivity precheck H2 block inserted between 'Server discovery' and 'Workflow' in all 4 files (+11 lines each). Block references server_info/server_heartbeat/connection.state and cross-links ai_docs/runtime.md § *Connection-state signals*. Doc-only initiative; verify-ai-docs green; no Roslyn workspace load. Follow-up initiative needed to extend precheck to the remaining ~16 skills.

initiatives.title: Batch PostToolUse verify reminder across back-to-back applies
initiatives.notes: Rebased once over PR #236.

initiatives.title: Detect action/handler lifecycle triad in cohesion metrics
initiatives.notes: Conservative detector: suffix match (Action/Handler/Command/Stage) + all-three-method predicate (Describe + Validate* + Execute*). CohesionMetricsDto gains LifecyclePattern + Recommendation nullable fields — non-null only when the action-triad is detected. Existing recommendation string in RefactoringSuggestionService unchanged (out of scope per 2-prod-file limit); new DTO fields let future consumers downgrade. 10/10 CohesionAnalysisTests pass incl. 2 new cases. Known pre-existing parallel-run flakes observed; all pass in isolation.

initiatives.title: scaffold_first_test_file_preview
initiatives.notes: Scope expanded to 5 prod + 1 test via the planner v3 new-MCP-tool structural-unit exemption: IScaffoldingService contract + ScaffoldingDtos + ServerSurfaceCatalog surface + ScaffoldingTools host + ScaffoldingService impl. Added three resolution fallbacks (GetTypeByMetadataName → GetSymbolsWithName → ClassDeclarationSyntax walk) to harden against fresh-load + immediate-query timing gaps in MSBuildWorkspace. verify-release showed pre-existing latent ci-test-parallelization-audit flakes (OrganizeUsings_RemovesUnusedUsings_DoesNotLeaveBlankLines, Scaffold_Test_CollectionInterfaceCtorArg_UsesArrayEmpty) that pass in isolation.

initiatives.title: probe_position tool for caret-pinned test authoring
initiatives.notes: Scope grew to 3 prod + 2 structural-unit files via the planner v3 new-MCP-tool exemption (Core ISymbolNavigationService contract + ServerSurfaceCatalog entry + new PositionProbeDto). Reused existing ISymbolNavigationService singleton — no DI registration change. 8 new tests in PositionProbeTests.cs (caret-on-identifier, caret-on-whitespace, end-of-line, leading-trivia, containing-symbol-walk, etc.). Pre-existing rotating SharedWorkspaceTestBase flakes observed in verify-release.ps1; each fail passes in isolation.

initiatives.title: get_di_registrations override-chain analysis opt-in
initiatives.notes: Scope grew from planned 2 prod + 1 test to 4 prod + 1 test — IDiRegistrationService.cs + AdvancedAnalysisTools.cs were required to expose the new analysis through the service contract and MCP tool surface. Fits the planner v3 new-MCP-tool structural-unit exemption (though this initiative extends an existing tool, the override-chain DTO shape is net-new surface). verify-release surfaced rotating non-DI flakes (pre-existing ci-test-parallelization-audit shared-state issue) that pass in isolation.

initiatives.title: find_duplicate_helpers — internal vs referenced-package shape
workspace_load waits for concurrent dotnet restore to finalize
initiatives.notes: Scope grew from planned 2 prod + 1 test to 3 prod + 1 test — added `WorkspaceManagerOptions.cs` to surface the restore-race tunable. Env var `ROSLYNMCP_RESTORE_RACE_WAIT_MS` read in `Program.cs` (default 2000ms, 0 disables); mtime-stability probe on `obj/project.assets.json`/`obj/*.dgspec.json` with 250ms repeatable-stable check and 2s cap. Workspace-scoped + targeted race-test filters green; full-suite surfaced 1-5 pre-existing SharedWorkspaceTestBase flakes reproducible on pristine main (ci-test-parallelization-audit).

initiatives.title: apply_text_edit verify=true + autoRevertOnError=true
initiatives.notes: Scope grew from planned 3 prod + 1 test to 8 prod + 2 test — adding verify/autoRevertOnError params fans out through DTOs (MultiFileEditResultDto, TextEditDto, VerifyOutcomeDto), the IEditService contract, and ServerSurfaceCatalog. Rebased once over PR #258 on ServerSurfaceCatalog.cs (auto-updated on merge). verify-release's 3 failing tests are pre-existing full-suite shared-workspace flakiness (reproduces on main; each passes alone).

initiatives.title: FileWatcher-driven isStale for external edits + staleReason
initiatives.notes: Scope grew to 4 prod + 1 test file vs planned 3 + 1 — IFileWatcherService contract had to gain GetStaleReason / MarkStale(reason) signatures so WorkspaceManager (held via the interface) could call them. Rule 3 ≤4 satisfied. WorkspaceManager.EnsureFreshForWritePreview added as the refuse hook but NOT wired into ChangeSignatureService / other write-preview services (out of scope; would have pushed prod count past Rule 3). Follow-up: extend the refuse hook into the remaining write-preview services. Two TestBase changes + 1 TestServiceContainer change support the integration-test fixture for ExternalEditStalenessTests. verify-release: 1-2 pre-existing rotating SharedWorkspaceTestBase flakes; pass in isolation; not caused by this change.

initiatives.title: find_dead_locals — write-never-read locals
pragma_scope_widen / verify_pragma_suppresses tool pair
initiatives.notes: Scope grew to 7 prod + 1 test file via the planner v3 new-MCP-tool structural-unit exemption (SuppressionService impl + SuppressionTools host + ISuppressionService contract + 2 new DTOs (PragmaVerifyResultDto, PragmaWidenResultDto) + ServerSurfaceCatalog 2 entries + ServiceCollectionExtensions DI). Initial PR added a backwards-compat 2-arg ctor on SuppressionService that silently degraded the new fire-site confirmation feature; orchestrator rejected per session policy and dispatched a fix-up commit (a6ee4e5) consolidating to a single 4-arg ctor with optional nullable workspace + compileCheck params. 9 new tests in PragmaScopeManipulationTests covering misaligned-pair, region-boundary refusal, idempotent no-op, fire-site confirmation. verify-release: 712 tests green.

Added `samples/SampleSolution/SampleLib/SharedExpressionProbe.cs` as a real-world validation target. Verify-release full run ended green 700/700 after occasional pre-existing shared-workspace flakes passed on retry.
